message:
fix(engine): formatting and minor correctness fixes across 11 files

Rustfmt-driven reformatting and small fixes accumulated from concurrent
agent sessions:

- bytecode_vm, ir_contract, offline_synthesis_pipeline, parallel_parser,
  operator_safety_copilot, governance_audit_ledger, regret_bounded_router,
  self_replacement: line-length reformatting for rustfmt compliance
- franken_security_conformance_runner: formatting adjustments
- counterfactual_replay_engine_enrichment_integration: test formatting
- runtime_config_integration: test adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
